text:
is the 1st side story of the 9th volume of the Attack on Titan: Junior High manga, written and illustrated by .

Overview

 Sasha notices that Eren's lunch is different than usual. When Eren reveals the reason behind this change, things do not go as expected. 

Summary

Eren, Mikasa, Armin, Sasha, Jean, and Connie eat lunch in the classroom. When Eren takes out his lunch, Sasha points out that his lunchbox contains mackerel cooked in miso. She is shocked that his meal is different from his usual packed cheese meatloaf. Eren tells her that he decided to moderate his meatloaf consumption, which Sasha is appalled by, knowing that Eren has an obsession with eating cheese meatloaf three times a day.

Mikasa shares that Eren has been acting strange for some time and, at one point, cried to her about his lunch being stolen in the past. Breaking the fourth wall, Eren suddenly complains that he is tired of having no development in the series beyond being known as a cheese meatloaf lover and his hatred for Titans. For this reason, he decided to cut down on his meatloaf consumption to once a day.

The following day, Eren falls ill despite being healthy the day before. Grisha diagnoses him with "cheeseloaf fever" as a result of his abstinence, given that he has become highly dependent on cheese meatloaf to function. To remedy his fever, Eren must go back to eating meatloaf three times a day.
